top_signals.title: Chinese, HK Investors Banned From SpaceX IPO on Security Grounds
top_signals.summary: Underwriters on SpaceX’s $75 billion initial public offering have been told not to accept orders from investors in Hong Kong and China, citing US restrictions around the export of critical technology, people with knowledge of the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tracking website, food watch: South Korea is obsessing over Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit
top_signals.summary: South Korean investors are eagerly tracking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's every move as they wait to see what the AI megacap company will do next.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. bitcoin, ether ETFs end record multibillion outflow streak
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India Government Said to Consider Hindustan Zinc Share Sale
top_signals.summary: India is considering selling as much as a 2% stake in Hindustan Zinc Ltd. in a transaction that could raise up to 50 billion rupees ($525 million), according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong taps JPMorgan, HSBC for expert group to scale tokenized bonds
top_signals.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority announced the formation of an expert group to advance the development of tokenized bonds.
